full_name.en: Student Creator Taiwan Community × NTU Apple Regional Training Center
full_name.zh-TW: Student Creator Taiwan Community × 臺灣大學 Apple 區域培訓中心

community_name.en: Student Creator Taiwan Community × NTU Apple RTC
community_name.zh-TW: Student Creator Taiwan Community × 台大 Apple RTC

community_subtitle.en: A six-month hybrid learning journey that helps students move from using AI tools to building AI-powered products with purpose.
community_subtitle.zh-TW: 為期六個月的混合式學習旅程，協助學生從使用 AI 工具，進一步成長為能打造 AI 產品的創作者。

intro.en: Community lead focusing on product direction, iOS development workflow, and student team coaching.
intro.zh-TW: 社群發起人，專注於產品方向、iOS 開發流程與學生團隊陪跑。

intro.en: AI educator and content strategist helping students turn technical ideas into clear user narratives.
intro.zh-TW: AI 教育者與內容策略顧問，協助學生把技術想法轉化為清晰的使用者故事。

intro.en: Technology strategy mentor guiding teams on market fit, MVP scope, and go-to-market basics.
intro.zh-TW: 技術策略導師，協助團隊釐清市場契合度、MVP 範圍與基本上市策略。

intro.en: Student builder focused on SwiftUI, rapid prototyping, and interaction design.
intro.zh-TW: 學生創作者，專注於 SwiftUI、快速原型與互動設計。

intro.en: Backend and data workflow contributor, supporting API integration and deployment.
intro.zh-TW: 後端與資料流程協作者，負責 API 串接與部署支援。

intro.en: Design and storytelling contributor translating technical work into clear demos and pitches.
intro.zh-TW: 設計與敘事協作者，將技術成果轉化為清楚的展示與提案。

event_name.en: AI in Action: From Idea to Build
event_name.zh-TW: 原來 AI 可以這樣用：從想法到實作

en: Why AI-native product thinking matters for students
Hands-on planning with AI for product scope
zh-TW: 為什麼學生需要 AI 原生的產品思維
AI 協作規劃實作與需求範圍切分
Xcode 開發流程示範與現場問答

notice.en: Students joining this event receive priority consideration for Summer Camp seats.
notice.zh-TW: 參與本場活動的同學可優先取得 Summer Camp 參與資格。

event_name.zh-TW: 我是怎麼從 0 做到 1：實作者分享場

en: Student team showcases from first prototypes
Mentor feedback on scope, tradeoffs, and execution
Summer Camp project topic submission briefing
zh-TW: 學生團隊初版作品展示
導師回饋：範圍、取捨與執行
AI 協作開發流程門診
Summer Camp 題目提交流程說明

notice.en: Bring your current prototype or storyboard for live feedback.
notice.zh-TW: 請攜帶目前的原型或分鏡，現場可獲得即時回饋。

en: Day 1: Team formation, product framing, and architecture planning
Day 2: Build sprint with mentor checkpoints
Day 3: Demo polish, judging, and public showcase
zh-TW: Day 1：組隊、產品定義與架構規劃
Day 3：成果打磨、評選與公開展示

notice.en: Register link will be published after team shortlisting is completed.
notice.zh-TW: 報名連結將於團隊篩選完成後公布。

en: AI is changing how software is built, but students often lack a practical path from tool usage to product ownership.
We exist to provide that path: structured mentorship, cross-domain collaboration, and a real build environment where ideas become working products.
zh-TW: AI 正在改變軟體開發方式，但多數學生仍缺乏從工具使用者成長為產品實作者的清晰路徑。
我們的存在，就是提供這條路：有結構的導師制度、跨域協作與真實的實作環境，讓想法變成可運作的產品。

en: Run practical sessions that combine product thinking, AI workflows, and iOS implementation.
Support student teams with mentor checkpoints, technical reviews, and iteration plans.
Publish student stories and build logs to create reusable learning assets for the next cohort.
Connect students with industry mentors and peers through a long-term builder community.
zh-TW: 舉辦結合產品思維、AI 工作流程與 iOS 實作的訓練活動。
透過導師檢核、技術審查與迭代計畫支援學生團隊。
持續發布學生故事與開發紀錄，累積可重用的學習資產。
建立長期創作者社群，連結學生、業界導師與同儕資源。

title.en: Building Our First AI Prototype in One Weekend
title.zh-TW: 我們如何在一個週末完成第一個 AI 原型

sub_title.en: How a small student team moved from uncertain idea to a testable app flow.
sub_title.zh-TW: 一個小型學生團隊如何從模糊想法走到可測試的 App 流程。

title.en: Zero to One Lessons from Student Product Building
title.zh-TW: 學生從 0 到 1 做產品的關鍵學習

sub_title.en: The execution habits that helped us ship instead of over-planning.
sub_title.zh-TW: 讓團隊不再過度規劃、而是真的交付成果的執行習慣。

title.en: Why Open Community Matters for Young Builders
title.zh-TW: 為什麼公開社群對年輕創作者很重要

sub_title.en: What we learned by sharing unfinished work in public.
sub_title.zh-TW: 從公開分享未完成作品中，我們學到的關鍵經驗。
